name: Mexican Style Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can (12 oz.) whole kernel corn with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, sauté the peppers and onions in margarine.
2. Stir in the whole kernel corn with its liquid and the drained shrimp.
3. Bring to a simmer. Do not boil!
4. Reduce heat and add the cheese snack.
5. Mix and heat slowly until the cheese is melted.
6. Garnish with parsley or cilantro.
